White Emo Chain Cross Grunge Neck Scarf fuses dark street style with raw emotion and alt-core edge. Featuring a distressed white fabric detailed with hanging chains and a metal cross charm, this scarf delivers the perfect blend of emo, goth, and grunge aesthetics.
